name: deep both-flow e2e: freelance gig platform drives design->decision->codesign->fullstack app (dotnet-aspnet) + IaC build on azure
command:
printf '%s' '{"complete":true,"answers":{"motivation":"revenue","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","budget_posture":"balanced","data_volume":"large","read_write_pattern":"balanced","data_cadence":"real-time","criticality":"mission-critical","data_sensitivity":"confidential","compliance_regime":"none","scale":"large","consistency_need":"strong","communication_style":"event-driven","integration_scope":"public","workload":"a freelance gig platform application"}}' > p.json
printf '%s' '{"stacks":{"backend-api":"dotnet-aspnet","frontend":"blazor","database":"azure-sql"}}' > tc.json
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-session.sh --vision "freelance-gig-platform" --profile p.json --out-dir s --now 2026-06-08T00:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/optimize-options.sh --options s/architecture-options.json --profile p.json --out sc.json 2>/dev/null
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/decision-package.sh --options s/architecture-options.json --scoring sc.json --out dp.json 2>/dev/null
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/codesign-build.sh --requirements s/technical-requirements.json --platform azure --decision-id d1 --toolchain tc.json --json 2>/dev/null > plan.json
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/scaffold.sh --kind react-spa --target app 2>/dev/null
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-build.sh scaffold --decision-id d1 --pillar reliability --requirements "health_check,multi_az" --build-dir bd 2>/dev/null
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-build.sh check --build-dir bd --unit d1 2>/dev/null; cbrc=$?
CB=$cbrc node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const tr=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("s/technical-requirements.json","utf8"));const dp=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("dp.json","utf8"));const plan=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("plan.json","utf8"));const pillars=Object.keys(tr.pillars).filter(p=>tr.pillars[p].length).length;const be=plan.app_units.find(u=>u.unit==="backend-api");const bothFlows=plan.app_units.length>0&&plan.infra_units.length>0&&plan.reconciled===true;const appBuilt=fs.existsSync("app")&&fs.readdirSync("app").length>0;const iacBuilt=fs.existsSync("bd/d1");process.exit((tr.needs_grounding.length===0&&pillars>=7&&dp.loop_closed===true&&bothFlows&&be&&be.stack==="dotnet-aspnet"&&appBuilt&&iacBuilt&&process.env.CB==="1")?0:1);' && echo freelance-gig-platform-bothflows-complete 1>&2
